author: doll-agent
content: Add ComplexPolynomial in power_complex.rs — complex-coefficient sibling of Polynomial. Surface covers eval/eval_complex/deriv/integ/add/sub/mul/from_roots/trim/truncate. Roots and fit intentionally out of scope (need complex companion-matrix eigensolver). 11 tests including (1+ix)(1-ix)=1+x², eval at i, integ∘deriv inverse.
